case_title: JOE W ODHAMS VS BURLINTON COAT FACTORY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BURLINTON COAT FACTORY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOE W ODHAMS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BURLINTON COAT FACTORY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEFENDANT TO REPAIR OR REPLACE LEATHER JACKET STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY JOE W ODHAMS AS TO DEFENDANT BURLINTON COAT FACTORY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
